title: The Affair of Babak and His Outbreak
description: It has been mentioned that Babak 's (first) rebellion was in the year 201 (816/817) and that the settlement and town that was his headquarters was al-Badhdh.57 (On that occasion) he put to flight

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 33
